string.text:
The SIG LVAW (Low Visibility Assault Weapon) is a short-barreled, suppressed, select-fire variant of the SIG MCX rifle, designed for military and law enforcement use as a personal defense weapon, featuring a short barrel and compact design.
 This model is chambered for .300 ACC Blackout.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: All scopes for Picatinny rails.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: Integral Suppressor.
 %c[ui_gray_2]DETAILS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Subsonic
